zh.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu於1199年出生。她和Alexandre II de Blanzy至少有1個女兒。她去世於1257年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu于1199年出生。她和Alexandre II de Blanzy至少有1个女儿。她去世于1257年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Charlieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andree, Emile, Jacques, Susette.
French and Walloon: occupational name for a cartwright, wheelwright, from Old French charrelier, a derivative of charrel ‘cart’, a diminutive of char ‘cart, carriage’ (see Char ).

variants.name: Charland
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Adelard, Emile, Aldor, Anatole, Andre, Armand, Benoit, Edouard, Euclide, Francois, Huguette.
French: probably a cognate of   Charlier   ‘cartwright, wheelwright’. This surname is rare in France.
History: Claude Charland dit Francoeur from Châteauroux in Indre, France, married first Jacqueline Desbordes in Quebec City, QC, in 1652, and second Jeanne Pelletier in Quebec City, QC, in 1661.

variants.name: Char
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Bharat, Gautam, Kalpana, Mohan, Padma, Rohini, Srikant, Usha, Vijay.
French: from Old French char ‘cart, carriage’ (from Late Latin carrum, a word of Gaulish origin), a metonymic occupational name for a carter.
Americanized form of Slovenian Čar (see Car ).

variants.name: Carlier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Achille, Adrien, Gaston, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French (mainly Nord and Aisne) and Walloon: Norman and Picard variant of   Charlier  . This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium and in the Netherlands. It was also brought to England by French Huguenots.

nameMeanings.name: Blandine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Adela, Enrique, Jose, Pedro, Alejandro, Colomba, Eulalia, Francisco, Guillermo, Herberto, Marcos, Mario.  Italian Pasquale, Antonio, Carmelo, Giovanni, Giuseppa, Rocco, Sal, Salvatore, Silvio.
Italian: from a diminutive of   Blando  .

variants.name: Blando
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Amadeo, Angelo, Caesar, Gino, Petrina, Vincenzo, Vito.  Spanish Domingo, Eduardo, Ernesto, Jesus, Joaquin, Luis, Manuel, Marcela, Margarita, Mercedes.  Polish Krzysztof, Lech.
Italian and Hispanic (Philippines): nickname from blando ‘flattering, caressing, smooth, gentle, mild’ (from Latin blandus), or from a personal name based on this adjective.
Polish: unexplained. It is found in central Poland.

en.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu was born in 1199. She had at least 1 daughter with Alexandre II de Blanzy. She died in 1257, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu est née en 1199. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Alexandre II de Blanzy. Elle est décédée en 1257, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu wurde 1199 geboren. Sie hatte mit Alexandre II de Blanzy mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1257 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu è nata il nel 1199. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Alexandre II de Blanzy. Morì nel 1257, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieuは1199年に生まれた。彼女はAlexandre II de Blanzyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1257年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu(은)는 1199년 태어났다. 그녀는 Alexandre II de Blanzy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1257년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu nasceu em 1199. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Alexandre II de Blanzy. Ela faleceu em 1257, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu родилась в 1199 г. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Alexandre II de Blanzy. Она умерла в 1257 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Blandine de Charlieu nació en 1199. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Alexandre II de Blanzy. Murió en 1257, a la edad de 58 años.
